title: The Herdsman's Vows
content:
A Kid vowed to Jove, so might he
    Find his herd, & his herd did he see
    Soon, of lions the prey:
    Then 'twas--"Get me away,
    And a goat of the best take for fee."

    How Often Would We Mend Our Wishes!
meaning:
"The Herdsman's Vows" is a quintessential example of Walter Crane's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
